
---
title: "Pairwise Result Summary (Complexity & Entropy)"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(glue)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(fs)
library(knitr)
library(here)

# Load your cleaned results
complexity_df <- readRDS(here("output/global_cancer/reports/complexity_cleaned.rds"))
entropy_df <- readRDS(here("output/global_cancer/reports/entropy_cleaned.rds"))

build_comparison_html <- function(df, engine = c("complexity", "entropy"), p_thresh = 0.05) {
  engine <- match.arg(engine)
  chunks <- list()

  for (chip_id in unique(df$chip)) {
    chip_df <- dplyr::filter(df, chip == chip_id)
    comparisons <- unique(chip_df$comparison)

    for (cmp in comparisons) {
      cmp_df <- dplyr::filter(chip_df, comparison == cmp)

      section <- glue::glue("<h2>{cmp} ({engine})</h2>")

      all_row <- dplyr::filter(cmp_df, gene_set_normalized == "ALL")
      if (nrow(all_row) == 1) {
        p_val <- signif(all_row$p_perm, 4)
        direction <- dplyr::coalesce(all_row$direction, all_row$spectral_direction, all_row$shannon_direction)
        all_text <- glue::glue("<h4>ALL Probes: p = {p_val} | {stringr::str_to_title(direction)}</h4>")
      } else {
        all_text <- "<h4>ALL Probes: (missing or malformed)</h4>"
      }

      go_rows <- cmp_df |>
        dplyr::filter(stringr::str_starts(gene_set_normalized, "GO:"), p_perm <= p_thresh)
      go_tbl <- if (nrow(go_rows) > 0) {
        desc <- dplyr::coalesce(go_rows$gene_set_name, go_rows$gene_set_normalized)
        dirn <- dplyr::coalesce(go_rows$direction, go_rows$spectral_direction, go_rows$shannon_direction)
        pval <- signif(go_rows$p_perm, 4)
        df_tbl <- data.frame(Description = desc, `p-value` = pval, Direction = stringr::str_to_title(dirn))
        knitr::kable(df_tbl, format = "html", caption = "Significant GO Terms")
      } else {
        "<p><i>No significant GO terms.</i></p>"
      }

      kegg_rows <- cmp_df |>
        dplyr::filter(
          stringr::str_detect(gene_set_normalized, "^[0-9]{4,5}$"),
          p_perm <= p_thresh | kegg_cancer == TRUE
        ) |>
        dplyr::distinct(gene_set_normalized, .keep_all = TRUE)
      kegg_tbl <- if (nrow(kegg_rows) > 0) {
        desc <- dplyr::coalesce(kegg_rows$gene_set_name, kegg_rows$gene_set_normalized)
        desc <- ifelse(kegg_rows$kegg_cancer, paste0(desc, " (cancer)"), desc)
        dirn <- dplyr::coalesce(kegg_rows$direction, kegg_rows$spectral_direction, kegg_rows$shannon_direction)
        pval <- signif(kegg_rows$p_perm, 4)
        df_tbl <- data.frame(Description = desc, `p-value` = pval, Direction = stringr::str_to_title(dirn))
        knitr::kable(df_tbl, format = "html", caption = "Significant or Cancer-Related KEGG Pathways")
      } else {
        "<p><i>No significant KEGG pathways.</i></p>"
      }

      hallmark_rows <- cmp_df |>
        dplyr::filter(stringr::str_detect(gene_set_normalized, "HALLMARK"), p_perm <= p_thresh)
      hallmark_tbl <- if (nrow(hallmark_rows) > 0) {
        desc <- dplyr::coalesce(hallmark_rows$gene_set_name, hallmark_rows$gene_set_normalized)
        dirn <- dplyr::coalesce(hallmark_rows$direction, hallmark_rows$spectral_direction, hallmark_rows$shannon_direction)
        pval <- signif(hallmark_rows$p_perm, 4)
        df_tbl <- data.frame(Description = desc, `p-value` = pval, Direction = stringr::str_to_title(dirn))
        knitr::kable(df_tbl, format = "html", caption = "Significant Hallmark Genes")
      } else {
        "<p><i>No significant Hallmark genes.</i></p>"
      }

      chunks[[length(chunks)+1]] <- paste(section, all_text, "<h4>GO Terms</h4>", go_tbl,
                                          "<h4>KEGG Pathways</h4>", kegg_tbl,
                                          "<h4>HALLMARK Genes</h4>", hallmark_tbl, "<hr/>")
    }
  }

  HTML(paste(chunks, collapse = "\n"))
}

complexity_html <- build_comparison_html(complexity_df, engine = "complexity")
entropy_html <- build_comparison_html(entropy_df, engine = "entropy")
```

## Complexity Results

```{r complexity, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
complexity_html
```

## Entropy Results

```{r entropy, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
entropy_html
```
